meta.title: Reclassification of Nonomuraea flexuosa (Meyer 1989) Zhang et al. 1998 as Thermopolyspora flexuosa gen. nov, comb. nov., nom. rev.
meta.journalTitle:
International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary
 Microbiology

bodyHtml:
International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology (2005), 55, part 5, 1979–1983 ARTICLE

The type strain of Thermopolyspora flexuosa, DSM 43186T, is incorrectly referred to in the abstract and text of the paper as DSM 41386. The correct strain number is given in the description of Thermopolyspora flexuosa comb. nov. at the end of the paper.
